obligation_description: Submit detailed engineering drawings for client approval

remarks: Foundation work 60% complete per client update

obligation_description: Submit monthly progress report with earned value analysis

obligation_description: Pay advance (15% of contract value) against bank guarantee

obligation_description: Provide performance bank guarantee (10% of contract value)

obligation_description: Maintain all-risk insurance for erection period

remarks: Insurance renewal being processed for project-specific policy

obligation_description: Submit O&M manual and as-built drawings before commissioning

obligation_description: Provide remote diagnostics software updates for 2 years
penalty_for_non_compliance: Failure to update may void extended support
evidence_required: Software version log and update acknowledgment
